name: VCF (24dB/oct LP)
description: This algorithm is a 24dB/octave lowpass filter, implemented using circuit emulation of a four pole transistor ladder filter [135] . It is a port of the same algorithm on the disting EX, for which there is a [video here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YfG_Bg_n7fs) [136] .
gui_description: The display simply shows the filter centre frequency, in Hz and as a MIDI note number.

parameters.name: Sweep
parameters.description: A manual frequency sweep control; offsets the frequency CV.

parameters.name: Resonance
parameters.description: Sets the filter resonance. The filter will self-oscillate at high resonances.

parameters.name: Drive
parameters.description: A gain control for the input to the filter. Boosting the input gives a subjectively pleasant non-linear distortion.

parameters.name: Normalize
parameters.description: If set, boosts the gain to compensate for the natural tendency of the circuit to lose low-frequency level as the resonance is increased.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: The number of busses to process.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

parameters.name: MIDI channel
parameters.description: Sets the MIDI channel on which to respond to note on events.

parameters.name: Keyboard track
parameters.description: Sets the amount by which the pitch of received MIDI notes affects the filter cutoff.

input_ports.name: Resonance input
input_ports.description: The resonance CV input bus. Scaled such that 5V corresponds to the full range.
